info.title: STAS Intervals Gateway
info.description: Gateway for Intervals.icu planned workouts (read/write/delete) + STAS DB endpoints. Auth via OAuth2.

get.summary: Get current user identity from JWT token
Get detailed package for one completed training
get.description: Read-only detailed package for one selected completed workout. Use after getTrainingsFromDB or getFullTrainings identifies the exact training_id. Do not batch this action across many workouts. The response omits rawData, route coordinates, latlng, and raw stream arrays.

parameters.name: training_id
parameters.description: Training id returned by trainings actions. Load trainings first to identify the exact completed workout.

200.description: Detailed activity package for one selected workout

404.description: Training not found for current user

get.description: Read current profile, goals, and rules with hashes. Use before preview so the saved hash is fresh. This does not write anything.

post.description: Preview one profile/goals/rules section using structured fields. For goals, send a flat items list with optional exact ISO date, goal, target result, and comment; server builds canonical goals text. Never saves; commit only after exact confirmation.

403.description: Write disabled, section disabled, not allowlisted, or sensitive data rejected

409.description: Current section text differs from previousHash

post.description: Save a previewed profile/goals/rules change. Call only after the user confirms the exact full new text shown from preview.

get.description: Read profile/goals/rules change history. This is read-only. Use before restore decisions, not as permission to restore.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of changes to return.

post.description: Restore a committed profile/goals/rules change. Call only after showing exact restore text and getting explicit user confirmation.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Return planned events for last N days window (relative). If omitted, can use oldest/newest.

delete.summary: Delete planned workouts by external_id_prefix + date window (supports dry_run)

parameters.name: external_id_prefix
parameters.description: Delete only events whose external_id starts with this prefix, e.g. plan: or test:

parameters.name: dry_run
parameters.description: If true, do not delete, only report what would be deleted.

post.description: Bulk create planned events via Intervals API (dedupe by external_id).

get.summary: Get full trainings (with splits/intervals) from STAS DB bridge

parameters.name: newest
parameters.description: End boundary date (YYYY-MM-DD). For calendar windows, use the day after the last desired date.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Relative days window. Prefer oldest/newest for planning history.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max trainings per page. Real cap is 50.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Pagination offset when a date window needs more pages.

parameters.name: full
parameters.description: Default true for Actions; send true/full=1 to include intervals and splits.

get.summary: Get full user summary via gateway (profile, metrics, trainings, pace journal, condition)

user_id.description: Intervals athlete id resolved from OAuth token

section.description: Choose profile for athlete facts, goals for targets, rules for constraints. Do not mix sections.

structured.description: Required. Send only the object matching section. For goals, send a flat items list with optional exact ISO date, goal, target result, and comment; the server builds canonical goals text.

previousHash.description: Hash returned by readProfileSections for this section.

diffSummary.description: Short factual summary of what changed. Do not include raw chat.

goals.description: Use only when section is goals. Server builds canonical goals text from the goals list.

ProfileMemoryStructuredInput.description: Structured profile memory input. Send only the object matching section. Do not include firstName.

birthYear.description: Birth year. Omit to preserve; null only to clear.

gender.description: Gender from the web profile form. Omit to preserve; null only to clear.

height.description: Height in cm. Omit to preserve; null only to clear.

weight.description: Weight in kg. Omit to preserve; null only to clear.

maxHr.description: Maximum heart rate. Omit to preserve; null only to clear.

ltHr.description: Lactate-threshold heart rate. Omit to preserve; null only to clear.

otherSports.description: Other sports. Omit to preserve; null only to clear.

raceResults.description: Race PR list. If provided, replaces the whole list; [] or null clears it. Omit to preserve.

additional.description: Additional durable profile context. Do not use for firstName.

date.description: Optional exact goal date in YYYY-MM-DD. Omit when unknown; approximate dates are not supported.

goal.description: Required goal or event, for example 5 км, 10 км, regularity, health, cycling event, or triathlon.

targetResult.description: Target result or measurable outcome. Omit when unknown; server writes `не указано`.

comment.description: Short durable context: role, preparation depth, taper/risk note, or season meaning. Omit when unknown; server writes `не указано`.

items.description: Flat goals list in the same shape as the web profile card. Every dated race is a real goal by default; do not demote goals into lower-value categories.

trainingsPerWeek.description: Exact single number for Тренировок в неделю. Do not send ranges, minimums, maximums, or flexible wording here.

offDays.description: Exact single number for Выходных. Do not send ranges, minimums, maximums, or flexible wording here.

restDays.description: Fixed rest weekdays for Дни отдыха, only when the user names fixed weekdays.

customRules.description: Separate durable custom rules. The server writes one Правило line per item.

changeId.description: Preview change id returned by previewProfileSectionChange.

newText.description: Server-rendered exact full text proposed or committed by the change. Do not send newText in preview requests.

end_date_local.description: Local end datetime. For NOTE all-day: next day T00:00:00

category.description: WORKOUT for training, NOTE for context/rest/illness. Defaults to WORKOUT if omitted.

type.description: Title Case activity type. Required for WORKOUT. Omit for NOTE.

moving_time.description: Duration in seconds. For WORKOUT only, omit for NOTE.

icu_training_load.description: Estimated training load. For WORKOUT only, omit for NOTE.

external_id.description: Unique ID for upsert/dedupe, e.g. plan:2026-03-11:easy-run or note:2026-03-11:illness

ActivityDetailResponse.description: AI-ready detailed passport for one completed workout. Raw source payloads, route coordinates, latlng, and raw stream arrays are intentionally omitted.

flags.description: Detected issues or notable conditions, for example uphill, pace_drop, hr_drift, missing_hr, weak_altitude, terrain_mismatch.

sourceActivityId.description: Source activity id if available; not a route or raw payload.

userReport.description: User self-report for the workout if available.

ActivityDetailListSection.description: Limited list section. available is the full detected count; returned is how many items are included in this response.

ActivityDetailItem.description: One detailed interval, lap, split, best effort, or segment item. Fields vary by section.

redactions.description: Confirms that raw source payloads, raw streams, and route coordinates were omitted.

note.description: Generic object; actual keys may vary by workout and data source.
